event: Nomination of a Prefect of Rome in the Sistine Chapel
symbols: Sistine Chapel frescoes visible above — the great biblical narrative cycle framing the ecclesiastical ceremony
papal throne and gold drapery — the temporal and spiritual authority of the papacy
assembled clergy in vestments — the hierarchical order of the Church gathered in solemn function
description: A painting depicting the interior of the Sistine Chapel during a formal papal ceremony. The scene is viewed from the rear of the chapel looking toward the altar end. The upper walls display large frescoes depicting biblical scenes with numerous figures. Below them, rich gold and crimson draperies hang along the walls. On a raised platform at center, a figure in white papal vestments is seated, surrounded by clergy in red cardinal's robes and other ecclesiastical garments. An audience of figures fills the lower portion of the composition, many standing or kneeling.

_meta.title: Nomination of a prefect of Rome in the Sistine Chapel
